master_template.description: Unified skeleton covering standard Randstad DPAs, Salesloft DPA, Techademy DPA, and Nondisclosure Agreements.

sections.slot_name: Instructions and Processing of Personal Data
Return and Destruction of Personal Data

clause_library.title: Preamble
clause_library.text:
This DPA is part of Existing agreement between [Randstad Entity / Controller] and [Supplier Entity / Processor]. Agreement: [Agreement Name] date: [Date]
I Whereas:
(A) Under the Agreement, the Supplier will provide Services to Randstad which involves that the Supplier will Process Personal Data for and on behalf of Randstad.
(B) The Parties are of the opinion that [Randstad OpCo] (Randstad) qualifies as “controller” and Supplier qualifies as a "Processor" and agree on the following provisions to govern the processing of Personal Data by Supplier on behalf of Randstad, to the extent necessary for the provision of the Services as described in the Agreement.

clause_library.title: HOW THIS DPA APPLIES
clause_library.text: This Data Processing Addendum (“DPA”) forms part of the Master Subscription Agreement (including Order Forms) between Customer and Salesloft or other written or electronic agreement between Salesloft and Customer for the purchase of online services from Salesloft (the “Agreement”) to reflect the parties’ agreement with regard to the Processing of Personal Data, in accordance with the requirements of Data Protection Laws. If the Customer entity signing this DPA is a party to the Agreement, this DPA is an addendum to and forms part of the Agreement.

clause_library.title: Preamble and Whereas
clause_library.text: A. This Data Protection Annex forms part of the Agreement dated [agreement_date] between [randstad_entity] ("Randstad Digital") and [supplier_entity] (“Supplier”). B. Under the Agreement, the Supplier will provide Services to Randstad Digital, its Affiliates or its Clients which involves that the Supplier will process Personal Data for and on behalf of Randstad Digital, its Affiliates or its Clients. C. The Parties are of the opinion that each Randstad Digital Affiliate recipient of the Services qualifies as independent “Controller” and Supplier qualifies as a "Processor"...

clause_library.title: 1. Instructions
clause_library.text: 1.1. The Processor shall at all times comply with its respective obligations under all applicable Data Protection Law, including without limitation the GDPR. 1.2. The Processor shall only Process Personal Data to the extent it is strictly necessary to provide the Services or perform its other obligations under the Agreement and shall do so exclusively on the instructions of Randstad as set out in this Data Protection Annex and its Appendix 1...

clause_library.title: 2. PROCESSING OF PERSONAL DATA
clause_library.text: 2.1 Roles of the Parties. The parties acknowledge and agree that with regard to the Processing of Personal Data, Customer is the Data Controller, Salesloft is a Data Processor... 2.2 Customer’s Processing of Personal Data. Customer shall, in its use of the Services, Process Personal Data in accordance with the requirements of Data Protection Laws. 2.3 Salesloft’s Processing of Personal Data. Unless required otherwise by law... Salesloft shall only Process Personal Data on behalf of and in accordance with Customer’s documented instructions...

clause_library.title: 1. Instructions (Detailed)
clause_library.text: 1.1. The Supplier shall at all times comply with its respective obligations under all applicable Data Protection Law, including without limitation the GDPR. 1.3. The Supplier shall notify Randstad Digital promptly if: 1.3.1. in its opinion, an instruction received by Randstad Digital infringes applicable Data Protection Law; 1.3.2. it cannot for any reason comply with its obligations... 1.3.3. it becomes aware of any circumstance or change in applicable Data Protection Law that is likely to have a substantial adverse effect...

clause_library.title: 3. Security and confidentiality
clause_library.text: 3.1. The Processor shall have in place and shall maintain for the duration of the Processing the security measures set out in the “Vendor Information Security Requirements (VISR)” provided by Randstad to the Processor. 3.2. The Processor will have the security of its Services certified at least annually by a qualified and independent auditor... 3.5. The Processor shall notify Randstad immediately if it detects or reasonably suspects that a Data Security Breach has occurred...

clause_library.title: 6. SECURITY
clause_library.text: Salesloft shall maintain administrative, physical, and technical safeguards for protection of the security, confidentiality, and integrity of Personal Data, as set forth in the Security Documentation. Salesloft regularly monitors compliance with these safeguards. Salesloft will not materially decrease the overall security of the Services during a subscription term.

clause_library.title: 3. Security and confidentiality (24hr Notice)
clause_library.text: 3.1. The Supplier shall have in place and shall maintain for the duration of the Processing the security measures set out in the “Vendor Information Security Requirements (VISR)” provided by Randstad Digital... 3.2. Taking into account the state of the art, the costs of implementation and the nature, scope... the Supplier shall implement and maintain appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure a level of security appropriate to the risk, as referred to in Article 32(1) of the GDPR. 3.6. The Supplier shall notify Randstad Digital within twenty-four (24) hours if it detects or reasonably suspects that a Data Security Breach has occurred...

clause_library.title: 5. International Transfers
clause_library.text: 5.1. Transfers from the EEA. This Section applies solely when the Processing of Personal Data by Processor or its Authorized Sub-processors involves a transfer from a Member State of the EEA to Supplier or its Authorized Sub-processors (i) located outside the EEA and (ii) not covered by an Adequacy Decision... b) EU Standard Contractual Clauses (MODULE TWO or THREE depending on scenario).

clause_library.title: 9. JURISDICTION SPECIFIC TERMS
clause_library.text: 9.1. EEA, UK, and Switzerland. To the extent Personal Data is subject to European Data Protection Laws... Salesloft participates in and self-certifies compliance with the Data Privacy Framework (“DPF”). If the DPF is revoked... the EU Standard Contractual Clauses and UK Standard Contractual Clauses shall apply. 9.2 United States. To the extent Personal Data is protected by the CCPA... Salesloft shall not sell Consumer Data.

clause_library.title: 5. International Transfers (UK & DPF)
clause_library.text: 5.2.2. EU Model Clauses... 5.2.3. UK Model Clauses. To the extent the transfer concerns personal data from the United Kingdom to any country outside EEA... Parties agree that the UK Model Clauses will apply. 5.2.4. EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework (DPF), Supplier has been certified under EU-U.S. DPF...

clause_library.title: Mutual Nondisclosure Agreement
clause_library.text: Each party hereto and its Affiliates would like to protect the confidentiality of, maintain their respective rights in and prevent the unauthorized use and disclosure of their valuable confidential information... For purpose of this Agreement, with respect to each party hereto, “Affiliate” means any entity that directly or indirectly controls, is controlled by or is under common control with such party...

global_variable_schema.title: Global DPA & NDA Variable Schema
global_variable_schema.description: Master schema covering all variables required across Randstad standard, Techademy, Salesloft, and NDA documents.

randstad_entity.description: Randstad Entity / Controller name(s) (e.g., Randstad Digital, Randstad India Private Limited)

agreement_name.description: Name of the existing Master Agreement

nature_and_purpose_of_processing.description: Detailed description of the Services and the purpose of processing

specification_of_processing_operations.description: List or description of processing operations to be carried out

type_of_personal_data.description: Specific types of Personal Data Processed

enum: Personal Data revealing trade union membership
data concerning a natural person's sex life
Data concerning a natural person's sexual orientation
Personal data relating to criminal convictions
No Special Categories of Personal Data will be Processed

special_categories_of_personal_data.description: Select special categories of data, or select 'None' if Option 2 applies.

enum: Corporate employees of Randstad / Randstad Digital
Prospects, customers, business partners, and vendors of Customer (who are natural persons)
Employees or contact persons of Customer’s prospects, customers, business partners, and vendors
Employees, agents, advisors, freelancers of Customer (who are natural persons)
Customer’s Users authorized by Customer to use the Services

categories_of_data_subjects.description: Categories of individuals whose data is processed.

retention_period.description: The period for which the personal data will be retained, or criteria used to determine that period.

processing_locations.description: Indicate Processing locations (e.g., India / outside India / EEA / US)

authorized_sub_processors.description: List of authorized Sub-processors. Can be 'None' or 'No subprocessors'.

governing_law_jurisdiction.description: The specific governing law (e.g., Law of India, laws of the Netherlands, laws of Ireland)

competent_court_location.description: Location of the Court chosen (e.g., Amsterdam, Ireland, chosen by Randstad Entity)

randstad_notice_email.description: Email address for Randstad Digital notices (Techademy variation)

supplier_notice_email.description: Email address for Supplier / Processor notices (Techademy variation)

nda_date.description: Date of the Mutual Nondisclosure Agreement (NDA variation)

nda_randstad_address.description: Registered office of Randstad Entity (NDA variation)

nda_supplier_address.description: Registered office of Supplier Entity (NDA variation)

customer_entity_name.description: Full legal name of the Customer / Data Exporter (Salesloft variation)

customer_address.description: Main registered address of the Customer (Salesloft variation)

customer_registration_number.description: Official registration number of the Customer (Salesloft variation)

customer_contact_details.description: Contact person's name, position, and email for the Customer (Salesloft variation)

customer_signer_name.description: Print Name of the Customer's authorized signatory (Salesloft variation)

customer_signer_title.description: Title of the Customer's authorized signatory (Salesloft variation)

salesloft_signer_name.description: Print Name of Salesloft's authorized signatory (Salesloft variation)

salesloft_signer_title.description: Title of Salesloft's authorized signatory (Salesloft variation)

dpa_effective_date.description: The effective date of the DPA (Start date in Table 1) (Salesloft variation)
